title: Add clickable category section with uploaded product images

requirements.summary: Display uploaded images below promotional sections on ProductBrowse page
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 uploaded images are displayed on the ProductBrowse page
Images are positioned below the two existing Meesho promotional sections
Images maintain consistent styling with the existing page design

file_operations.description: Add a new section below the existing two Meesho promotional sections that displays all 8 uploaded images (frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102.png, frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-1.png, frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-2.png, frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-3.png, frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-4.png, frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-5.png, frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-6.png, frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-7.png) with consistent styling that matches the existing page design

requirements.summary: Implement interactive category section with collapsible product images
acceptanceCriteria: The first image (1771838406102.png) acts as a category thumbnail/trigger
Clicking the first image toggles the visibility of the remaining 7 product images
Product images display in a grid layout underneath the clicked category image
The interaction provides visual feedback (hover states, active states)

file_operations.description: Create a reusable component that displays the category thumbnail (frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102.png) as a clickable trigger and shows/hides the 7 product images (frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-1.png through frontend/public/assets/uploaded/1771838406102-7.png) in a responsive grid layout when clicked, with hover and active state visual feedback
Import and render the CategoryImageSection component in the section created for REQ-12, replacing the static image display with the interactive category section component

requirements.summary: Reference uploaded product images as static assets
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 uploaded images are accessible from frontend/public/assets/uploaded/
Images load correctly without backend routing
Image paths are properly referenced in the ProductBrowse component

file_operations.description: Ensure all image references use the correct static asset paths from frontend/public/assets/uploaded/ directory (e.g., /assets/uploaded/1771838406102.png) and include appropriate alt text, loading states, and error handling for each image
